scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n "front,api,user,bot,game,rep" -c "cyan,green,yellow,blue,magenta,red" "npm run dev:frontend" "cd packages/api-gateway && node --watch index.js" "cd packages/user-service && node --watch index.js" "cd packages/bot-service && node --watch index.js" "cd packages/game-service && node --watch index.js" "cd packages/reporting-service && node --watch index.js"
